title: Trump hints at what’s coming in a new batch of UFO files
description: His February directive called for transparency around "alien and extraterrestrial life, unidentified aerial phenomena (UAP), and unidentified flying objects (UFOs).” The post Trump hints at what’s coming in a new batch of UFO files appeared first on Boston.com .

title: Trump says Pentagon will release new, ‘very interesting’ UFO files ‘very soon’
description: President Donald Trump is promising to release new UFO records that he says will be “very interesting.”
